description: Legal document. This is the signature portion, torn away from the main document. It is a huge horizontal strip with writing only in the middle section. Witnesses: Moshe b. Ṣadoq ha-Ṣadiq b. Yoshiyyahu Av the descendant of Rabbenu ha-Qadosh; and ʿEli b. Netanel ha-Levi. Moshe b. Ṣadoq signed other documents in the 12th century. There are small letters of authentication above and below his name.
description_he: מסמך משפטי, חלק החתימה שנקרע מהמסמך הראשי. עדים: משה ב' צדוק הצדיק ב' יאשיה אב הצאצא מרבנו הקדוש; ועלי ב' נתנאל הלוי.
